title: Peer Support
distinction: Peer support is accompaniment from someone who has been where you are. No advice unless you ask for it.

connections.title: My Peer Support Connections
connections.subtitle: View your active and past peer support connections.

myRequests.title: My Peer Support Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Your pending peer support requests. Withdraw a request if it is no longer needed.
myRequests.empty: You have no pending peer support requests.

professional.bannerBody: Peer support complements — but does not replace — professional mental health care. If you need more, reaching out to a professional is a sign of strength.

find.title: Find Peer Support
find.subtitle: Accompaniment from someone who has genuinely navigated something like what you're facing.
find.empty: No peer support offers match your filters.
find.noOffers: No peer support offers available right now. Check back soon.

offer.capacity: How many connections you can hold at once
offer.boundaryStatement: Your boundary statement — what you can and cannot hold

request.whatSupportLooks: What support looks like for you right now

private.title: How was this connection for you?
private.feltSafe: Did you feel safe in this connection?
private.note: Your responses are private and help stewards understand patterns — not individuals.

public.title: Optional: what made this useful (brief)
public.prompt: What made this connection useful, if anything you'd like to share.
public.note: This is optional and brief. Nothing is required.

offerForm.minSituations: Please list at least one situation you have navigated.
offerForm.success: Your peer support offer has been published.
offerForm.situationsPlaceholder:
Burnout in movement work
Loss of a founding team member
Transitioning out of leadership
offerForm.situationsHint: These describe what you have been through — not credentials or expertise.
offerForm.formatPlaceholder: e.g. async text, 30-min video calls, voice notes
offerForm.boundaryPlaceholder: e.g. I can hold space for grief and burnout, but I am not equipped for active crisis. Please seek professional support if you are in acute distress.
offerForm.boundaryHint: This is shown to everyone who browses your offer. Be honest about what you can and cannot hold.

requestForm.success: Your request has been submitted. Browse offers to find someone who's been there.
requestForm.situationPlaceholder: e.g. Burnout after a campaign, grieving a community fracture
requestForm.whatSupportLooks: What does support look like for you right now?
requestForm.whatSupportPlaceholder: e.g. Someone to listen without trying to fix anything. Someone who's been through something similar.
requestForm.whatNotLooking: What are you not looking for?
requestForm.whatNotLookingPlaceholder: e.g. Advice or solutions. People who haven't experienced burnout themselves.
requestForm.whatNotLookingHint: Being honest about this helps you find the right person and protects everyone's time.

professionalSupportBanner.body: If you are in crisis or need professional support, please contact a mental health professional or crisis helpline. Peer support is not a substitute for professional care.
